speaker: GRATIANO
text: This is the penthouse under which Lorenzo

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Desired us to make stand.

speaker: SALARINO
text: His hour is almost past.

speaker: GRATIANO
text: And it is marvel he outdwells his hour,

speaker: GRATIANO
text: For lovers ever run before the clock.

speaker: SALARINO
text: O, ten times faster Venus’ pigeons fly

speaker: SALARINO
text: To seal love’s bonds new-made than they are wont

speaker: SALARINO
text: To keep obligèd faith unforfeited.

speaker: GRATIANO
text: That ever holds. Who riseth from a feast

speaker: GRATIANO
text: With that keen appetite that he sits down?

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Where is the horse that doth untread again

speaker: GRATIANO
text: His tedious measures with the unbated fire

speaker: GRATIANO
text: That he did pace them first? All things that are,

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Are with more spirit chasèd than enjoyed.

speaker: GRATIANO
text: How like a younger or a prodigal

speaker: GRATIANO
text: The scarfèd bark puts from her native bay,

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Hugged and embracèd by the strumpet wind;

speaker: GRATIANO
text: How like the prodigal doth she return

speaker: GRATIANO
text: With overweathered ribs and raggèd sails,

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Lean, rent, and beggared by the strumpet wind!

speaker: SALARINO
text: Here comes Lorenzo. More of this hereafter.

speaker: LORENZO
text: Sweet friends, your patience for my long abode.

speaker: LORENZO
text: Not I but my affairs have made you wait.

speaker: LORENZO
text: When you shall please to play the thieves for wives,

speaker: LORENZO
text: I’ll watch as long for you then. Approach.

speaker: LORENZO
text: Here dwells my father Jew.—Ho! Who’s within?

speaker: JESSICA
text: Who are you? Tell me for more certainty,

speaker: JESSICA
text: Albeit I’ll swear that I do know your tongue.

speaker: LORENZO
text: Lorenzo, and thy love.

speaker: JESSICA
text: Lorenzo certain, and my love indeed,

speaker: JESSICA
text: For who love I so much? And now who knows

speaker: JESSICA
text: But you, Lorenzo, whether I am yours?

speaker: LORENZO
text: Heaven and thy thoughts are witness that thou art.

speaker: JESSICA
text: Here, catch this casket; it is worth the pains.

speaker: JESSICA
text: I am glad ’tis night, you do not look on me,

speaker: JESSICA
text: For I am much ashamed of my exchange.

speaker: JESSICA
text: But love is blind, and lovers cannot see

speaker: JESSICA
text: The pretty follies that themselves commit,

speaker: JESSICA
text: For if they could, Cupid himself would blush

speaker: JESSICA
text: To see me thus transformèd to a boy.

speaker: LORENZO
text: Descend, for you must be my torchbearer.

speaker: JESSICA
text: What, must I hold a candle to my shames?

speaker: JESSICA
text: They in themselves, good sooth, are too too light.

speaker: JESSICA
text: Why, ’tis an office of discovery, love,

speaker: JESSICA
text: And I should be obscured.

speaker: LORENZO
text: So are you, sweet,

speaker: LORENZO
text: Even in the lovely garnish of a boy.

speaker: LORENZO
text: But come at once,

speaker: LORENZO
text: For the close night doth play the runaway,

speaker: LORENZO
text: And we are stayed for at Bassanio’s feast.

speaker: JESSICA
text: I will make fast the doors and gild myself

speaker: JESSICA
text: With some more ducats, and be with you straight.

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Now, by my hood, a gentle and no Jew!

speaker: LORENZO
text: Beshrew me but I love her heartily,

speaker: LORENZO
text: For she is wise, if I can judge of her,

speaker: LORENZO
text: And fair she is, if that mine eyes be true,

speaker: LORENZO
text: And true she is, as she hath proved herself.

speaker: LORENZO
text: And therefore, like herself, wise, fair, and true,

speaker: LORENZO
text: Shall she be placèd in my constant soul.

speaker: LORENZO
text: What, art thou come? On, gentleman, away!

speaker: LORENZO
text: Our masquing mates by this time for us stay.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Who’s there?

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Signior Antonio?

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Fie, fie, Gratiano, where are all the rest?

speaker: ANTONIO
text: ’Tis nine o’clock! Our friends all stay for you.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: No masque tonight; the wind is come about;

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Bassanio presently will go aboard.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: I have sent twenty out to seek for you.

speaker: GRATIANO
text: I am glad on ’t. I desire no more delight

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Than to be under sail and gone tonight.
